headline: A Look At Teledyne Technologies (TDY) Valuation After Mixed Recent Share Price Performance
summary: What Teledyne Technologies Stock’s Recent Returns Tell You Teledyne Technologies (TDY) has caught investor attention after a mixed run, with the share price up about 20% over the past 3 months but down around 7% over the past month. See our latest analysis for Teledyne Technologies. At a latest share price of $623.80, Teledyne Technologies has seen short term momentum ease with a 7 day share price return of about a 3.4% decline after a strong 90 day gain of roughly 20%. headline: Axon vs. Teledyne: Which Defense & Security Stock has Greater Upside?
summary: TDY edges AXON with stronger defense demand, rising aerospace sales and a more attractive valuation despite ongoing supply-chain pressures.
